headline: Flex to Acquire Electrical Power Products to Boost Power Capabilities
summary: FLEX to acquire EP2 for $1.1B, boosting its critical power portfolio and targeting growth from electrification, grid upgrades and data center expansion.

headline: Cathie Wood Buys $3.1 Million of Nvidia-Backed Tech Stock

headline: Shares of companies within the broader technology sector are trading higher amid optimism for a swifter end to the Middle East conflict following reports of conciliatory steps by the U.S. and Iran.
